module-2-inventory-watchlist-project.label: Module 2 Inventory Watchlist Project
module-2-inventory-watchlist-project.summary: Build an inventory watchlist with practical filters that narrow the list step by step.

mp-1-find-budget-products.title: Find budget products
mp-1-find-budget-products.prompt: Begin the Module 2 Inventory Watchlist Project. Return `id, name, price` from `products` in that column order. Keep only rows where `price < 20`.
mp-1-find-budget-products.hint: Adjust the comparison so the watchlist keeps products under 20.

help.concept: Read the brief as a result contract: identify the source table or join path, the result columns, the row condition or grouping rule, and any required ordering.
help.hint_1: Build the result one clause at a time and run it after each meaningful change.
help.hint_2: Return `id, name, price` from `products` in that column order. Keep only rows where `price < 20`.

mp-1-find-budget-products.starterCode:
-- Returning id, name, and price from products where price is less than 20.
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  price
FROM products
WHERE price <= 10;

mp-2-focus-on-stationery.title: Focus on the stationery items
mp-2-focus-on-stationery.prompt: Extend the Module 2 Inventory Watchlist Project with the next approved requirement. Return `id, name, price` from `products` in that column order. Keep only rows where `price < 20 AND category = 'Stationery'`.
mp-2-focus-on-stationery.hint: Use AND to keep both rules true at the same time.

help.concept: Read the brief as a result contract: identify the source table or join path, the result columns, the row condition or grouping rule, and any required ordering.
help.hint_1: Build the result one clause at a time and run it after each meaningful change.
help.hint_2: Return `id, name, price` from `products` in that column order. Keep only rows where `price < 20 AND category = 'Stationery'`.

mp-2-focus-on-stationery.starterCode:
-- Keep the budget filter above.
-- Add a category filter for Stationery.
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  price
FROM products
WHERE price < 20;

mp-3-finish-watchlist.title: Finish the low-stock watchlist
mp-3-finish-watchlist.prompt: Complete the Module 2 Inventory Watchlist Project. Return `id, name, price, stock` from `products` in that column order. Keep only rows where `price < 20 AND category = 'Stationery' AND stock <= 15`.
mp-3-finish-watchlist.hint: Add `stock` to the selected columns, then keep values at or below `15`.

help.concept: Read the brief as a result contract: identify the source table or join path, the result columns, the row condition or grouping rule, and any required ordering.
help.hint_1: Build the result one clause at a time and run it after each meaningful change.
help.hint_2: Return `id, name, price, stock` from `products` in that column order. Keep only rows where `price < 20 AND category = 'Stationery' AND stock <= 15`.

mp-3-finish-watchlist.starterCode:
-- Keep the filters above.
-- Add stock and a low-stock rule for products with stock <= 15.
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  price
FROM products
WHERE price < 20
  AND category = 'Stationery';

try_module_2_inventory_watchlist_project.title: Preview Budget Products
try_module_2_inventory_watchlist_project.prompt: Before adding category and stock rules, preview the budget products. Return `id`, `name`, and `price` from `products` where `price` is less than `20`.

module-2-inventory-watchlist-project.label: Module 2 Inventory Watchlist Project
module-2-inventory-watchlist-project.summary: Build an inventory watchlist with practical filters that narrow the list step by step.

mp-1-find-budget-products.title: Find budget products
mp-1-find-budget-products.prompt: Start the watchlist by returning `id`, `name`, and `price` from `products` where `price` is less than 20.
mp-1-find-budget-products.hint: Adjust the comparison so the watchlist keeps products under 20.

help.concept: Start broad, then tighten the watchlist with the right filter.
help.hint_2: Run the query and confirm the results table shows only cheaper products.

mp-1-find-budget-products.starterCode:
-- Returning id, name, and price from products where price is less than 20.
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  price
FROM products
WHERE price <= 10;

mp-2-focus-on-stationery.title: Focus on the stationery items
mp-2-focus-on-stationery.prompt: Add a second rule so the watchlist only keeps products in the `Stationery` category.
mp-2-focus-on-stationery.hint: Use AND to keep both rules true at the same time.

help.concept: Multiple conditions narrow the result set one rule at a time.
help.hint_2: Add `AND category = 'Stationery'`, then rerun the query.

mp-2-focus-on-stationery.starterCode:
-- Keep the budget filter above.
-- Add a category filter for Stationery.
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  price
FROM products
WHERE price < 20;

mp-3-finish-watchlist.title: Finish the low-stock watchlist
mp-3-finish-watchlist.prompt: Add `stock` to the result and one more rule so the final query only keeps products where `stock` is less than or equal to `15`.
mp-3-finish-watchlist.hint: Add `stock` to the selected columns, then keep values at or below `15`.

help.concept: The final step preserves the budget and category rules, then adds a stock threshold that returns a real watchlist.
help.hint_2: Use `AND stock <= 10` in the WHERE clause, then rerun the query.

mp-3-finish-watchlist.starterCode:
-- Keep the filters above.
-- Add stock and a low-stock rule for products with stock <= 15.
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  price
FROM products
WHERE price < 20
  AND category = 'Stationery';

try-module-2-inventory-watchlist-project.title: Preview Budget Products
try-module-2-inventory-watchlist-project.prompt: Before adding category and stock rules, preview the budget products. Return `id`, `name`, and `price` from `products` where `price` is less than `20`.
try-module-2-inventory-watchlist-project.hint: Keep the three requested columns and use a strict price comparison below `20`.

help.concept: This warm-up creates the budget filter that the watchlist project will refine.
help.hint_1: Check the selected columns and table name in the SQL editor.
help.hint_2: Run the query and compare the result table with the expected result.

try-module-2-inventory-watchlist-project.starterCode:
-- Return id, name, price from the products table.
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  price
FROM products
WHERE price <= 10;

try_module_2_inventory_watchlist_project.title: Preview Budget Products
try_module_2_inventory_watchlist_project.prompt: Before adding category and stock rules, preview the budget products. Return `id`, `name`, and `price` from `products` where `price` is less than `20`.

sketch_project_brief.title: Project brief
sketch_project_brief.bodyMarkdown:
A restocking review needs a short watchlist of affordable stationery with limited inventory.

Start with budget products, narrow the category, then add the stock threshold.

The finished query should surface a small, actionable list instead of an empty report.

sketch_project_brief.bodyMarkdown:
